docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF THABITI HAYES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME RISE IS PRESENT DE JUANEA GEORGE, ON SITE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, THABITI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME RISE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME RISE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO MAY-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THABITI HAYES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME RISE IS PRESENT DE'JANAE GEORGE, ON SITE MANAGER. DEFENDANT QUESTIONED ON SERVICE AND FOUND TIMELY BUT NOT FILED. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY FILING. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAYES, THABITI AS TO DEFENDANT HOME RISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CURE FOR UNTIMELY FILING.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
